description: §45 clean neg — the canonical absence check `x is not` SHALL NOT fire E-EQ-002. Same `x: string | not` binding as `equality/eq-not-reject`, but using the correct keyword form instead of `== not`. `notCodes` asserts E-EQ-002 stays silent.
rationale: §45: `x is not` is the sanctioned absence check; E-EQ-002 fires only on the `== not` / `!= not` mis-form, never on `is not`.
